title: calamintha neorotundifolia
intro: Calamintha neorotundifolia, also known as the roundleaf calamintha or roundleaf basil, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calamintha neorotundifolia include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Calamintha neorotundifolia can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
